🎂

Happy
Birthday

Inga

Remember last year at Basel?
All those questions. All that "wait, what is this?"
All that pretending we knew what we were looking at? 😂

This year we're going back — Art Basel Miami Beach, Take 2.
Except this time? We're showing up educated.
We made you a whole study plan. Thursdays. Wine. No tests.

Oh — and your flight is our treat. 🛫

With love, Dan & Iris ♥

Iris & Inga — Basel 2026

Art Basel Miami Beach · December 2024

We were
there.

Last year we showed up with zero context and maximum enthusiasm. This year we're coming back with both. Tap any photo.

"Take 1. We had no idea what we were walking into."
Miami Beach · December 2024
"The moment before it all began. She had no idea what was inside."
Art Basel · Miami Beach Convention Center
"Framed. Literally. By @martinrussocki outside Art Miami."
Art Miami · Wynwood
"This dog was groomed to look like a giraffe. It was inside the fair. Nobody questioned it. Art Basel."
Inside the fair 🦒
"Beeple's 'Regular Animals.' Jeff Bezos in the front. $100,000 each. Sold out day one."
Beeple Studios · Zero 10 · Art Basel
"Iris figured out it was interactive before anyone else. The kids just confirmed it."
Digital art · somewhere in the fair
"A life-size woman in a domino bra, six feet tall, completely unbothered. Same energy we want at Basel 2026."
Sculpture · Art Basel fair floor
"Every book wrapped in African wax fabric. We still don't know if you could take them out."
Library installation · Art Basel
"This is what 'looking at art' actually looks like. We walked about 12 miles that day."
Iris · browsing the fair
"She saw herself in this one. We both did."
Outdoor sculpture · Art Miami
"We genuinely don't know. We loved it."
Pink inflatable · somewhere above Miami
"Scale. This is what Meridians does to you."
Giant red shoes · Meridians sector

June → December 2026

The study plan
— 20 weeks,
2 hrs a week

Thursday nights, a bottle of wine, and zero pressure. Think of it like "art tasting," not school. Click any week to see what to watch, what to know, and what to talk about.

Iris & Inga — Art Basel Miami Beach 2026
Personal use only · Made with curiosity · Dec 4–6, 2026
